Subject: Charge\n\nBody: Zoca just charged me. I should be getting a refund per our last call and not be getting charged again. Please refund
Hello Leigh Ann,  We’ve cancelled your account and refunded the November months payment.   Please feel free to reach out to me here in case of any further assistance :)
Hello Leigh Ann,  Happy Thanksgiving, hope you’re having a great day ♥️  The RCA report is ready. Please let me know your availability to set up a meeting to go through it.

Hi Leigh Ann,  It was really nice speaking with you earlier!  I want to start by saying how sorry we are for the confusion. We take full responsibility for the communication gap, and I truly appreciate your patience whil…

creative reality. This is Leanne. Hello. Hello. Am I speaking to Leanne? Yes, you are. Hi Leanne. This is Monisha from Zoka. How are you? Oh, hi. How are you? I was pretty sick the last week, but I'm fine now. Thank you …

Hi Leigh, I’m really sorry for the confusion. Monisha has been out due to health concerns, but rest assured, I’ve noted your request to cancel Zoca and will ensure it’s processed. Raj will call you post in an hour as per…

Hello Leigh Ann,  Hope you’re doing well!  I was extremely sick and was unavailable. However I’m back to work today.  I acknowledge your request to cancel the service and I’d love to hop on a call with you as soon as pos…
Hello Leigh, we are on the meeting link
I am extremely apologetic for the experience you have been having and this is not what we stand for.
We will ensure that you have a smoother experience moving forward. Rest assured.
Hello Leigh Ann! This is Raj here from Zoca!  My team and I are waiting for you on the call.
I can\'t do a call today.. I had one scheduled yesterday on my day off. I was trying to get someone\'s attention.  I have posted on my app for days!! I am working today
We will make sure that we would be available for you anytime tomorrow or any other day as well. Please let us know whatever suits you.
Ok
Hellllo
Hey, this is LeAnne. I'm trying to contact someone from Zoka. No one will respond to me. Thanks!
Hey!  I need someone from your company to respond to me
Hello? Why did you delete my messages
I would like to cancel Zoca. Thank you
Hi.  I need to cancel Zoca    Thank you
Thank you😊
Here are our November/Black Friday specials:  1. Microdermabrasion & LED light for $79  2. Brow lamination - 50% off  3. 3 customized facials for $225 - package deal
You’re welcome :)
Thank you so much for sharing the same. I’ll ask the team to start promoting this 👍🏼
Let me just give you a call now if that’s okay?
We scheduled the meeting at 11?
I’m so sorry, I think it’s because of day light savings
Okay, sounds good. Thank you
You may join the same link
Hey Leigh Ann,  I’m waiting in the meeting room. Would you be joining?
This is Ashley. We are not at the office yet and I havent heard from Leigh Ann
Ok, sounds good
Yes, its only 10am here
Hello,   I tried calling to but it went straight to voicemail.   I’ve dropped off from the meeting. Please let me know when we can reschedule :)
Oh alright, no worries. Let’s connect in an hour :)
You’re welcome :)
Hi, this is Leanne with Gloss Genius, you can leave a message or you can also book online at
I completely understand, but as we’ve discussed earlier Local SEO is a tedious process and we’ve already began seeing results on your profile which indicates that the optimisation is working.
No.  I just need some results at this juncture. Thank you
I also saw 3 new leads in the last week of October but I don’t understand whats going on as the status is not marked on the Zoca app
Hello Leigh Ann,  Apologies the delayed response! I wasn’t working as it was the weekend.  Are the review responses automated or are you doing them manually?

I had a client help me and she told me how work on getting the review removed and we were successful.  She also recommended not using clients entire names when responding to them on google. It looks more personal this wa…
Got it, Leigh Ann. I can definitely speak to the team about it.   Is there anything else I can help you out with? We can set up a call sometime this week.
Im sorry, im not sure zoca is fulfilling it’s AMAZING promises!!!!
I need to respond to a review promptly!!!

Hello. Hey, hi, how are you Leanne? I'm doing well. How are you? I'm good. Thank you so much for asking Leanne. This is Raj from Zoka. Yeah. How are you doing Leanne? It's been a while. It has. Yes, it's been over a mont…

Hey Leigh Ann,  It was lovely speaking with you :)   As discussed, we connect again on 6th November at 11 AM. The link has been shared to you on your email ID.   Please share me the offers and promotions for November in …
Hello Leigh Ann,  I’m finally back to work. So it was the festival Diwali and it’s a festival of lights 🪔
Alright, let me check and ask the team to update it

Subject: Follow-Up and Action Plan from Our Recent Meeting X ZOCA\n\nBody: Hi Leigh Ann, It was great connecting with you during our recent discussion. I’m really pleased to see the steady progress in both reviews and le…
Hi, awesome! What is the festival?

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major Indian festival, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to schedule m…
Hi the last google update was about make up services. We don’t do that
Anytime :)
It helps them do it in shop and they are forgetting.   Thanks for the info on this
Ok
Just give me the list of people who come to you post August 1st?
Let’s keep getting reviews, which will boost your profile along with the optimisation that we are doing for you
No worries! You can also give me your client data of anyone who has come to you in the past, so that we can run review automations for them.  We need the Name, Number, Email and Service taken.
And the notes
Ok,  yes we are getting reviews. However we need the new clients to get more reviews, clients can only submit 1x.
Yes I understand, you can ask friends and family for reviews as well.
We are doing a free give away for a review and a basket valued around $100 for new membership sign up
Hi  I have not had any organic leads. Getting concerned. Thank you

That’s good. However, please communicate to your clients verbally only.  If Google finds out that you are  incentivising your clients reviews, they will suspend your account. So please be very careful :)
Oh ok, I didn’t think of that.

Hey Leigh Ann,  Hope you are well!   I completely understand where you’re coming from. Please don’t worry as we are optimising your profile, and it will take some time to start seeing results. It’s too soon to give up.
I have over 900 people on my list
It’s only been a month, so you will need to have some patience and faith in us because we are doing everything on our end to help you out :)
Hello Leigh Ann,  How are you?   Is there anything apart from this?
